$comment: ★ phase 4.7 golden snapshot — UC-PETSTORE-015 상품 검색 (★ AP-PETSTORE-005 N+1 검색 / BR-PETSTORE-PRODSRCH-003 keyword split LIKE).

scenarios.name: happy path — multi-keyword 검색 (★ ★ N+1 — keyword.split 후 keyword 별 SQL 호출)
scenarios.when: CatalogActionBean.searchProducts() → CatalogService.searchProductList('dog cat') → keywords.split('\\s+') = ['dog', 'cat'] → 각 keyword 별 productMapper.searchProductList('%' + lower(keyword) + '%')

intent_classification.note: ★ ★ keyword split + LIKE = 의도된 multi-keyword 검색 / 그러나 N+1 패턴 = AP-005 동반

behavior_likely_bug: ★ ★ AP-PETSTORE-005 — keyword 별 SQL 호출 (N+1 검색) — 모범 = MyBatis `<foreach>` 단일 SQL OR 또는 FULL TEXT SEARCH
